summary: Comprehensive testing of Safe-Spend AAV integration features: Agent ID support, AAV Authority Verification, ARL Outcome Reporting, Cross-Tool Events, Organization Linking, and Control Plane API endpoints. All 32 backend tests passed. All 3 documentation pages verified with correct sections.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed HMAC signature verification in /app/backend/src/routes/internal-events.js - was using JSON.stringify(req.body) which could produce different string than original payload due to key ordering. Now uses req.rawBody for accurate signature verification.
test_credentials: Test users created dynamically with pattern test_integration_{uuid}@test.com, password: TestPass123!
seed_data_creation: Test escrow accounts and policies created during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Safe-Spend AAV integration features are working correctly. Backend tests cover: Agent ID validation (agt_ + 24 hex format), Escrow with agent_id, Spend with agent_id, Agent-scoped endpoints, Agent certificates CRUD, Internal events with HMAC auth, Org linking, Control Plane API, and Policies with reputation fields. Frontend docs pages verified: /docs/aav-integration, /docs/api, /docs/webhooks.

tests: POST /v1/org/link with valid token links org

pages_verified: /docs/aav-integration - Agent ID, ARL Reputation, Cross-Tool Events, Control Plane, ID Format Reference, Certificate Mapping, Authority Verification sections present
/docs/api - Agent Endpoints, Agent Certificates, Control Plane API, Organization Linking, Internal Events sections present
/docs/webhooks - AAV Verification Events, Cross-Tool Events, aav.verification_passed/denied/failed, safe_spend.spend.approved/denied events present

mocked_apis_note: AAV and ARL external services are MOCKED/disabled via env vars (AAV_ENABLED=false, ARL_ENABLED=false). The endpoints exist but external calls are skipped. Spending works normally without AAV/ARL verification.
